author: chatgpt-codex-connector
body:
**<sub><sub>![P2 Badge](https://img.shields.io/badge/P2-yellow?style=flat)</sub></sub>  Define where large 3D binaries live**

This tells the gift repo to store 3MF project files directly in git, but the dossier never adds the high-leverage storage rule a beginner needs for generated 3MF/STL/G-code/preview artifacts. Without a `.gitattributes`/Git LFS or Releases/Actions-artifact boundary, the repo can quickly accumulate large binary history; GitHub warns on regular files above 50 MiB and blocks larger pushes, while [Git LFS](https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/working-with-files/managing-large-files/about-git-large-file-storage) stores large files as pointers.

Useful? React with 👍 / 👎.
